name: Sunday Salsa Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Stir all ingredients together except parsley in a large bowl until well mixed.
3. Place the mixture in a greased or sprayed 5 x 9-1/2-inch loaf pan and bake until done and browned, about 1 hour.
4. Remove from oven and let stand for 5 minutes.
5. Run a knife around the sides of the pan to loosen the meat loaf.
6. Invert onto a large plate or platter.
7. Garnish with parsley if desired.
8. Serve.
